'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=15t3SZkIbXLeidzf4V_zVC5LvCbTGRVAbUa7qPCDDo8-1774560976-1.0.1.1-3Pg.0rRXEXMD30fcDC3E9aH2uJj6DAyxlPqPetntbyc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
